title: Comforting Slovakian Potato Dumplings
description: A traditional Slovakian dish featuring fluffy potato dumplings infused with rosemary and a hint of mustard, served with a rich beurre-monte sauce, this recipe is sugar-free-friendly and perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the grated potatoes, flour, egg, rosemary, mustard, salt, and pepper, and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for about 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and gently add the dumplings.
Cook the dumplings for 10-12 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
While the dumplings are cooking, prepare the beurre-monte sauce by melting the butter in a saucepan over low heat.
Once the dumplings are done, remove them from the water with a slotted spoon and serve with the beurre-monte sauce.
Garnish with additional rosemary sprigs if desired.
